calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Arnold Casillas, Esq. for Petitioner(s): Maria Esther Gonzalez, as guardian ad litem for and with: Michael Gonzalez and Jennifer Gonzalez, minor Claimants.
Petitioner & Interpreter were/ was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise of pending action is approved.
As to Michael Gonzalez:
$30,000 payable annually guaranteed for 4 years to begin at age 18 (10/22/2021)
$50,000 lump sum payable at age 25 (10/22/2028))
$75,000 lump sum payable at age 28 (10/22/2031)
$130,732.86 lump sum payable at age 30 (10/22/2033)
Attorney's fees: $62,500.00
Medical expenses total $7,783.18
For a Total of $250,000.00

As to Jennifer Gonzalez:
$20,000 payable annually guaranteed for 4 years to begin at age 18 (12/20/2017)
$40,000 lump sum payable at age 25 (12/20/2024)
$65,000 lump sum payable at age 28 (12/20/2027)
$128,880.55 lump sum payable at age 30 (12/20/2029)
Attorney's fees: $62,500.00
Medical expenses total $7,783.18
For a Total of $250,000.00
To be placed in a single pewmium annuity from American General Life Insurance Co A.M. Best A15 Rated Carrier with patments as specified above.

Order signed by Judge Chaitin.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Off Calendar
